SEARCH
Module ProjetGenieLogicel3
Package model

Class Node

java.lang.Object
model.Node
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Node extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a node in the graph. A node can contain agents and may be blocked or limited by capacity.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Description
    private Accident
    accident
     
    private boolean

    Indicates whether the node is blocked (not accessible)

    Remaining congestion wait cycles (set to 2 when overcrowded)

  • Constructor Details

    • Node

      public Node(int id)
      Creates a new node with a given identifier. The node is unblocked by default, with unlimited capacity and no agents.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier of the node

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the node identifier.
      Returns:
      node id

    • getMaxCapacity

      public int getMaxCapacity()
      Returns the maximum capacity of the node.
      Returns:
      maximum number of agents allowed

    • setMaxCapacity

      public void setMaxCapacity(int maxCapacity)
      Sets the maximum capacity of the node.
      Parameters:
      maxCapacity - new maximum capacity

    • getAllAgents

      public List<Agent> getAllAgents()
      Returns the list of all agents currently on this node.
      Returns:
      list of agents

    • containsAgent

      public boolean containsAgent(Agent agent)
      Returns whether the given agent is on this node.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to check
      Returns:
      true if the agent is on this node

    • addAgent

      public void addAgent(Agent agent)
      Adds an agent to this node if it is not already present.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to add

    • removeAgent

      public void removeAgent(Agent agent)
      Removes an agent from this node.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to remove

    • getPriorityAgents

      public List<Agent> getPriorityAgents()
      Returns the list of priority agents currently located on this node.
      Returns:
      list of priority agents

    • setPriorityAgents

      public void setPriorityAgents(List<Agent> priorityAgents)
      Sets the list of priority agents currently located on this node.
      Parameters:
      priorityAgents - list of priority agents to set

    • getNoPriorityAgents

      public List<Agent> getNoPriorityAgents()
      Returns the list of no-priority agents currently located on this node.
      Returns:
      list of no-priority agents

    • setNoPriorityAgents

      public void setNoPriorityAgents(List<Agent> noPriorityAgents)
      Sets the list of no-priority agents currently located on this node.
      Parameters:
      noPriorityAgents - list of no-priority agents to set

    • isBlocked

      public boolean isBlocked()
      Returns whether the node is blocked.
      Returns:
      true if the node is not accessible

    • setBlocked

      public void setBlocked(boolean blocked)
      Sets whether the node is blocked.
      Parameters:
      blocked - true to block the node

    • getCongestionWaitCycles

      public int getCongestionWaitCycles()

    • setCongestionWaitCycles

      public void setCongestionWaitCycles(int cycles)

    • isHeavilyCongested

      public boolean isHeavilyCongested()
      Returns true if this node is currently in heavy congestion mode.
      Returns:
      true if the number of agents exceeds maxCapacity

    • getX

      public Double getX()
      Returns the X coordinate of the node.
      Returns:
      x coordinate

    • setX

      public void setX(Double x)
      Sets the X coordinate of the node.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate

    • getY

      public Double getY()
      Returns the Y coordinate of the node.
      Returns:
      y coordinate

    • setY

      public void setY(Double y)
      Sets the Y coordinate of the node.
      Parameters:
      y - y coordinate

    • registerPass

      public void registerPass(double speed)
      Registers a pass through this node with the given speed.
      Parameters:
      speed - speed of the agent passing through

    • getPassCount

      public int getPassCount()
      Returns the number of passes through this node.
      Returns:
      pass count

    • getAveragePassedSpeed

      public double getAveragePassedSpeed()
      Returns the average speed of agents that passed through this node.
      Returns:
      average speed, or 0.0 if no passes recorded

    • resetPassStats

      public void resetPassStats()
      Resets pass statistics for this node.
